summary: The authors introduce CRAFT, an LLM-powered supervised framework for black-box adversarial rank attacks that outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and transfers across diverse neural ranking architectures.

blocks.content: Led to Mislead: Adversarial Content Injection for Attacks on Neural Ranking Models

source_span.quote: # Led to Mislead: Adversarial Content Injection for Attacks on Neural Ranking Models

blocks.content: We propose CRAFT, a supervised framework for black-box adversarial rank attacks powered by large language models (LLMs).

source_span.quote: We propose CRAFT, a supervised framework for black-box adversarial rank attacks powered by large language models (LLMs).

blocks.content: CRAFT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving higher promotion rates and rank boosts while preserving fluency and semantic fidelity.

source_span.quote: Extensive experiments on the MS MARCO passage dataset, TREC Deep Learning 2019, and TREC Deep Learning 2020 benchmarks show that CRAFT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving higher promotion rates and rank boosts while preserving fluency and semantic fidelity.

blocks.content: CRAFT transfers effectively across diverse ranking architectures, including cross-encoder, embedding-based, and LLM-based rankers, underscoring vulnerabilities in real-world retrieval systems.

source_span.quote: Moreover, CRAFT transfers effectively across diverse ranking architectures, including cross-encoder, embedding-based, and LLM-based rankers, underscoring vulnerabilities in real-world retrieval systems.

blocks.content: CRAFT operates in three stages: adversarial dataset generation via retrieval-augmented generation and self-refinement, supervised fine-tuning on curated adversarial examples, and preference-guided optimization to align generations with rank-promotion objectives.

source_span.quote: CRAFT operates in three stages: adversarial dataset generation via retrieval-augmented generation and self-refinement, supervised fine-tuning on curated adversarial examples, and preference-guided optimization to align generations with rank-promotion objectives.

blocks.content: Neural Ranking Models (NRMs) are central to modern information retrieval but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial manipulation.

source_span.quote: Neural Ranking Models (NRMs) are central to modern information retrieval but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial manipulation.

blocks.content: This work provides a principled framework for studying adversarial threats in NRMs, underscores the risks of generative AI in rank manipulation, and provides a foundation for developing more robust retrieval systems.

source_span.quote: This work provides a principled framework for studying adversarial threats in NRMs, underscores the risks of generative AI in rank manipulation, and provides a foundation for developing more robust retrieval systems.
